---
name: Project Request 💡
about: Suggest a new Arduino component or project you want to learn!
title: '[REQUEST] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**What component do you want to learn about?**
(e.g., A Soil Moisture Sensor, an OLED Screen, an MP3 player module)

**What would be a cool project to build with it?**
(e.g., A smart plant pot that beeps when the soil is dry!)

**Why is this helpful for beginners?**
(Tell us why this should be the next project added to the Master Hub!)
